_comment: v0.3 5-dimension rubric. Section 11 of v0.3-design.md. Every dimension is computed from real data — no hardcoded constants. Replaces v0.2's rubric.yaml which had dishonest comp_score / cultural_score dimensions.

role_title.description: JD title token overlap with the user's target role_families.

skills_overlap.description: Fraction of the user's tech tags and skill names that appear in the JD body.

company_tier.description: Boost for dream_companies; neutral for unknown; zero for exclusions.

location_remote.description: Match against target locations or 'remote' indicators in the JD location.

red_flags.description: Penalty when an exclusion term appears in the JD body or title. Inverse: 1.0 means clean.
